title: Agent Manifest v1
description: SSOT for agent (.claude/agents/<name>.md, AGENT.md) frontmatter. Mirrors Anthropic agent spec + portability + handoff. Agents have no applies_when (LLM-routed) — they activate via directive description and tool matchers. Refs: docs/migration/0002.

name.description: kebab-case identifier. Must equal agent file name (without .md).

description.$comment: P1: minLength 1 (PoC tolerant). P2~ strict requires >=40 chars + directive style ('Use PROACTIVELY when ...') for LLM router accuracy. Validated by validate-skill-frontmatter.sh.

model.$comment: Anthropic model id (e.g. opus-4-7, sonnet-4-6, haiku-4-5) or alias (opus, sonnet, haiku, inherit). Optional; harness default applies when absent.

tools.description: Allowed tool names. Empty array = no tools (analysis-only). Absent = inherit harness default.

version.description: Semantic version. Optional in P1, required at P8 (registry-ready).

produces.description: Artifact types this agent outputs. Vocabulary defined in .claude/agents/_handoff.yml; enforced by scripts/validate-agent-handoff.sh.

consumes.description: Artifact types this agent expects. Vocabulary defined in .claude/agents/_handoff.yml.
